front: Architecture: designed the overall layout of Brasilia in the shape of an airplane or cross, with the Monumental Axis at its center
Architecture: collaborated with Oscar Niemeyer (civic buildings) and Roberto Burle Marx (landscapes); ordered by President Juscelino Kubitschek
Architecture: developed the 'pilot plan' for this capital city; used Parque Guinle apartment designs for the housing towers
Architect: influenced by Le Corbusier; incorporated his Radiant City concepts into Brasilia's layout
Architecture: co-designed with Oscar Niemeyer and Roberto Burle Marx in Rio de Janeiro
Architecture: designed a museum using materials salvaged from the ruins of the Church of Sao Miguel Arcanjo
